Tub..personality: A restless, cosmopolitan type with a constant desire to travel, change surroundings, and seek something new — always wanting to go somewhere or find a new doctor. Constitutionally debilitated with inherited weakness, easily fatigued, and prone to relapsing conditions that never fully resolve.
Tub..mental_state: Aversion to mental work with persistent, tormenting thoughts that crowd upon each other during the night. Hopelessness pervades many complaints, and the mind may border on insanity — intellectual symptoms and lung symptoms are notably interchangeable in this constitution.
Tub..emotional_pattern: Anxious from evening until midnight, especially during fever, with a sullen, taciturn, and irritable disposition. Weary of life with a deep restlessness that drives the person to move, walk, and travel, as sitting still intensifies both physical and emotional suffering.
